top matches.text: Where personal data have not been obtained from the data subject, the controller shall provide the data subject with the following information: (f) where applicable, that the controller intends to transfer personal data to a recipient in a third country or internat­ ional organisation and the existence or absence of an adequacy decision by the Commission, or in the case of transfers referred to in Article 46 or 47, or the second subparagraph of Article 49(1), reference to the appropriate or suitable safeguards and the means to obtain a copy of them or where they have been made available.

top matches.text: Where requests from a data subject are manifestly unfounded or excessive, in particular because of their repetitive character, the controller may either: (b) refuse to act on the request. The controller shall bear the burden of demonstrating the manifestly unfounded or excessive character of the request.
top matches.embedding text: actions: bear action: bear object: the burden of demonstrating the manifestly unfounded or excessive character of the request. actor: (b) refuse to act on the request. The controller condition: Where requests from a data subject are manifestly unfounded or excessive text: Where requests from a data subject are manifestly unfounded or excessive, in particular because of their repetitive character, the controller may either: (b) refuse to act on the request. The controller shall bear the burden of demonstrating the manifestly unfounded or excessive character of the request.

top matches.text: Paragraph 1 shall not apply if the decision: (a) is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller;
top matches.embedding text: actions: apply action: apply object: if the decision: (a) is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller; actor: Paragraph 1 condition: if the decision text: Paragraph 1 shall not apply if the decision: (a) is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller;

top matches.text: If the purposes for which a controller processes personal data do not or do no longer require the identification of a data subject by the controller, the controller shall not be obliged to maintain, acquire or process additional information in order to identify the data subject for the sole purpose of complying with this Regulation.
top matches.embedding text: actions: obliged action: obliged object: to maintain, acquire or process additional information in order to identify the data subject for the sole purpose of complying with this Regulation. actor: the controller temporal: by the controller condition: If the purposes for which a controller processes personal data do not or do no longer require the identification of a data subject by the controller manner: by the controller text: If the purposes for which a controller processes personal data do not or do no longer require the identification of a data subject by the controller, the controller shall not be obliged to maintain, acquire or process additional information in order to identify the data subject for the sole purpose of complying with this Regulation.

top matches.text: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller confirmation as to whether or not personal data concerning him or her are being processed, and, where that is the case, access to the personal data and the following information: (h) the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling, referred to in Article 22(1) and (4) and, at least in those cases, meaningful information about the logic involved, as well as the significance and the envisaged consequences of such processing for the data subject.
top matches.embedding text: actions: have action: have object: the right to obtain from the controller confirmation as to whether or not personal data concerning him or her are being processed, and, where that is the case, access to the personal data and the following information: (h) the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling, referred to in Article 22(1) and (4) and, at least in those cases, meaningful information about the logic involved, as well as the significance and the envisaged consequences of such processing for the data subject. actor: The data subject temporal: following information condition: where that is the case text: The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller confirmation as to whether or not personal data concerning him or her are being processed, and, where that is the case, access to the personal data and the following information: (h) the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling, referred to in Article 22(1) and (4) and, at least in those cases, meaningful information about the logic involved, as well as the significance and the envisaged consequences of such processing for the data subject.

top matches.text: Where, in cases referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, the controller is able to demonstrate that it is not in a position to identify the data subject, the controller shall inform the data subject accordingly, if possible.
top matches.embedding text: actions: inform action: inform object: the data subject accordingly, if possible. actor: the controller condition: Where text: Where, in cases referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, the controller is able to demonstrate that it is not in a position to identify the data subject, the controller shall inform the data subject accordingly, if possible.

top matches.text: Without prejudice to Article 11, where the controller has reasonable doubts concerning the identity of the natural person making the request referred to in Articles 15 to 21, the controller may request the provision of additional information necessary to confirm the identity of the data subject.
top matches.embedding text: actions: request action: request object: the provision of additional information necessary to confirm the identity of the data subject. actor: the controller condition: where the controller has reasonable doubts concerning the identity of the natural person making the request referred to in Articles 15 to 21 text: Without prejudice to Article 11, where the controller has reasonable doubts concerning the identity of the natural person making the request referred to in Articles 15 to 21, the controller may request the provision of additional information necessary to confirm the identity of the data subject.

rerank query: Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor had visited the other website.
